queries.question: Provide a list of all day spas and also provide a list of wellness retreats that cost 150.0.
queries.sql:
SELECT Relaxation_spot.Name 
FROM Relaxation_spot
WHERE Relaxation_spot.type = "Day Spa" OR Relaxation_spot.type = "Wellness Retreat" AND Relaxation_spot.price = 150.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?relaxation_spot a :Relaxation_spot .
  ?relaxation_spot p:name ?name .
  ?relaxation_spot p:type ?type_w .
  ?relaxation_spot p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?relaxation_spot p:price ?price_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Day Spa" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Wellness Retreat" && (STR(?price_w) = "150" || STR(?price_w) = "150.0"))))
}

queries.question: Which day spas cost 150.0 and which wellness retreats cost the same amount?
queries.sql:
SELECT Relaxation_spot.Name 
FROM Relaxation_spot
WHERE (Relaxation_spot.type = "Day Spa" OR Relaxation_spot.type = "Wellness Retreat") AND Relaxation_spot.price = 150.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?relaxation_spot a :Relaxation_spot .
  ?relaxation_spot p:name ?name .
  ?relaxation_spot p:type ?type_w .
  ?relaxation_spot p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?relaxation_spot p:price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Day Spa" || STR(?type_w2) = "Wellness Retreat")) && (STR(?price_w) = "150" || STR(?price_w) = "150.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display day spas and wellness retreats that cost 150.0.
